title: Now Hiring Store Manager at GAP India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at GAP India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with GAP India! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About GAP India:
GAP India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAP India!
